data.title: Ethereum at a crossroads: Undervalued asset shows signs of whale accumulation amid price uncertainty
data.description:
19-4-2025 – The cryptocurrency Ethereum (ETH) finds itself at a pivotal juncture, with market dynamics painting a complex picture of opportunity and caution. Data reveals that ETH’s MVRV Z-Score has slipped below the neutral threshold of 0, entering an accumulation zone reminiscent of late 2020 and 2023. This dip signals that ETH is trading below [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ethereum-at-a-crossroads-undervalued-asset-shows-signs-of-whale-accumulation-amid-price-uncertainty/

data.title: Solana DEX Trading Volume Surpasses Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DeFiLlama reveals that Solana's decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume reached $1.887 billion in the past 24 hours, surpassing Ethereum's DEX trading volume of $1.182 billion. This marks a significant achievement for Solana, positioning it ahead of Ethereum in terms of DEX activity.

data.title: Galaxy Digital has withdrawn 606,000 SOL from exchanges in the past 4 days and pledged 462,000 SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, in the past 4 days, Galaxy Digital withdrew 606,000 SOL (US$79.7 million) from the exchange and pledged 462,000 SOL (US$60 million).

data.title: Galaxy Digital Withdraws and Stakes Significant Amount of SOL
data.description: According to Foresight News, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that Galaxy Digital has withdrawn 606,000 SOL tokens, valued at approximately $79.7 million, from exchanges over the past four days. Of this amount, 462,000 SOL tokens, worth around $60 million, have been staked.

data.title: USDC Circulation Increases by 1 Billion in Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3.2 billion USDC and redeemed around 2.2 billion USDC in the week ending April 17, resulting in a net increase of about 1 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 60.8 billion, supported by reserves of approximately 61 billion USD. This reserve includes around 7.7 billion USD in cash and about 53.3 billion USD held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: Gate.io WCTC S7 Participants Exceed 20,000, Prize Pool Reaches 5 Million USD
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io WCTC S7 participants exceed 20,000, prize pool up to 5 million US dollars
Gate.io 12th anniversary brand upgrade, WCTC S7 World Cryptocurrency Trading Competition is launched. As of April 19, the number of participating users has exceeded 20,000, successfully unlocking a prize pool of 200,000 US dollars. At present, the cumulative number of groups has reached 649, and the largest team has more than 1,500 members.
It is reported that this competition covers a series of activities such as team competitions, individual competitions, and red envelope rain. The dynamic prize pool is as high as 5 million US dollars. The team competition tops the Ford Mustang GT sports car super prize. The registration period is from 00:00 on April 15 to 00:00 on June 8 (UTC), and the competition period is from 00:00 on May 7 to 00:00 on June 8 (UTC).

data.title: Abraxas Capital-related wallets have withdrawn nearly $250 million in Bitcoin in the past four days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a wallet associated with Abraxas Capital withdrew 505 bitcoins (about 42.64 million US dollars) from Binance within 9 hours. In the past four days, the wallet has withdrawn a total of 2,949 bitcoins from the exchange, worth about 250 million US dollars, showing a trend of large whales and institutions continuing to increase their holdings of Bitcoin.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Continues to Experience Fear
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the cryptocurrency market is experiencing ongoing fear, as indicated by the latest data from Alternative. The current Fear and Greed Index stands at 32, slightly down from yesterday's 33, reflecting a persistent sense of panic among investors.

The Fear and Greed Index, which ranges from 0 to 100, is calculated based on several factors: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's dominance in the market (10%), and Google search trends (10%). These components collectively provide insights into the market sentiment, highlighting the cautious approach of investors in the current climate.

data.title: Cardano Price Surge To $1.7: Here Are The Factors To Drive The Recovery
data.description:
The Cardano price may be preparing for a powerful rally toward $1. 7, as new indicators suggest a potential recovery. A leading crypto analyst has identified multiple bullish catalysts that could drive ADA’s momentum and help propel the cryptocurrency to this bullish target. Institutional Interest To Fuel Cardano Price Recovery According to a recent technical analysis by a pseudonymous TradingView analyst, ‘Risk_Adj_Return,’ the Cardano price is suddenly showing signs of recovery after a period of sluggish performance
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/cardano-price-surge-to-1-7/
